etymology.raw: manduriye ‘roller’?

Infectum and Infectum-wa.turoyo: ašər mədli l-i=mandruniye, k-obaʕno mandanno əšmo i=goro
translations:
ach,
			ich habe die Dachwalze genommen und wollte ein bisschen das Dach
			walzen

42. Ánnaqqa áydarbo ktowe?
			Azzə́n li+qamaytayḏe, mxamalle9
			manduriye (manduriye, kefo, ha hawxa, ha hawxa ḥləmto, ha hawxa
			mandrí<w>ayna meqəm ann+igore. Naqqa dlatwa čimanto
			mandríwayna ann+igore eba).

Now then, how does it go?
			They went to meet him, they dressed up a roller (a roller, a
			stone, like so, so thick, formerly we used to flatten roofs this
			way. When there was no cement we used to flatten roofs with it). –
			Story of Joseph
